title: crotalaria limosa
intro: Crotalaria limosa, also known as the swamp hairy pea or swamp calabar bean, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids. The health benefits of Crotalaria limosa include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
